'''thayate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:glamorously|glamorously]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-y-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:glamorously|glamorously]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thayate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thayate|thayate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thayatesher|thayatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thayatesherĂ«m|thayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thayatero|thayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thayateshĂ«|thayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thayateshĂ«m|thayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithayatero|gokithayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithayateshĂ«|gokithayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithayateshĂ«m|gokithayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothayankerom|gothayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothayankeshĂ«|gothayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothayankeshĂ«m|gothayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothayankeya|gothayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thayaterom|thayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thayatemu|thayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thayateya|thayateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithayaterom|gokithayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithayatemu|gokithayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithayateya|gokithayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thayayate|thayayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thayayatesher|thayayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thayayatesherĂ«m|thayayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thayayatero|thayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thayayateshĂ«|thayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thayayateshĂ«m|thayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithayayatero|gokithayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithayayateshĂ«|gokithayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithayayateshĂ«m|gokithayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothayayankerom|gothayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothayayankeshĂ«|gothayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothayayankeshĂ«m|gothayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothayayankeya|gothayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thayayaterom|thayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thayayatemu|thayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thayayateya|thayayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithayayaterom|gokithayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithayayatemu|gokithayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithayayateya|gokithayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠyĂŠte|thĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠyĂŠtesher|thĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠyĂŠtero|thĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠyĂŠtero|gokithĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠyĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothĂŠyĂŠnkeya|gothĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠyĂŠterom|thĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠyĂŠtemu|thĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠyĂŠteya|thĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠyĂŠterom|gokithĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠyĂŠteya|gokithĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thafyafte|thafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafyaftesher|thafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafyaftesherĂ«m|thafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafyaftero|thafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafyafteshĂ«|thafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafyafteshĂ«m|thafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafyaftero|gokithafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafyafteshĂ«|gokithafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafyafteshĂ«m|gokithafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafyafnkerom|gothafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafyafnkeshĂ«|gothafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafyafnkeshĂ«m|gothafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafyafnkeya|gothafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafyafterom|thafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafyaftemu|thafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafyafteya|thafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafyafterom|gokithafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafyaftemu|gokithafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafyafteya|gokithafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
